name: paseo

scripts.version: bun run version:sync-internal && bun run release:prepare && git add -A
scripts.release:check: bun run release:prepare && bun run --filter @getpaseo/server typecheck && bun run --filter @getpaseo/cli typecheck && bun run --filter @getpaseo/server build && bun run --filter @getpaseo/cli build
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: bun publish --dry-run --workspace=@getpaseo/server --access public && bun publish --dry-run --workspace=@getpaseo/cli --access public
scripts.release:publish: bun publish --workspace=@getpaseo/server --access public && bun publish --workspace=@getpaseo/cli --access public
scripts.release:patch: bun run version:all:patch && bun run release:check && bun run release:publish && bun run release:push
scripts.release:minor: bun run version:all:minor && bun run release:check && bun run release:publish && bun run release:push
scripts.release:major: bun run version:all:major && bun run release:check && bun run release:publish && bun run release:push

description: Paseo: voice-controlled development environment with OpenAI Realtime API
author: moboudra
